# integration-runtime

Runtime integrations for MCP, plugins, remote control, and browser/desktop bridges.

## Included Skills
- `runtime-integrator`: integration diagnosis and runtime wiring decisions.
- `mcp-bootstrap`: MCP server bootstrap, path/token checks, and health verification.

## Legacy command focus
`mcp`, `plugin`, `reload-plugins`, `remote-control`, `remote-env`, `chrome`, `desktop`, `web-setup`, `mobile`.
